			name = "Fighter 1944 A"
			type = small_plane_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
				special_type_slot_4 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_cas = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 C"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = tank_buster_2
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = dive_brakes_small
							special_type_slot_4 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 C"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = tank_buster_2
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = dive_brakes_small
							special_type_slot_4 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1944 C"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = tank_buster_2
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = dive_brakes_small
				special_type_slot_4 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas new_profile=C prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1944 C"
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_cas = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 B"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 B"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1944 B"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
				special_type_slot_4 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas new_profile=B prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1944 B"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=B missing_profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_cas = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 A"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1944 A"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1944 A"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
				special_type_slot_4 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1944 A"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=A missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_bomber = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 C"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_2
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_4 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 C"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_2
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_4 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1944 C"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_2
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
				special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_4 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber new_profile=C prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1944 C"
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_bomber = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 B"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 B"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1944 B"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
				special_type_slot_4 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber new_profile=B prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1944 B"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=B missing_profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_bomber = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 A"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1944 A"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
							special_type_slot_4 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1944 A"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
				special_type_slot_4 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1944 A"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber profile=A missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_carrier_fighter = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter new_profile=C prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 C"
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_carrier_fighter = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 B"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter new_profile=B prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 B"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B missing_profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_carrier_fighter = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 A"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 A"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1944 A"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = empty
				special_type_slot_2 = empty
				special_type_slot_3 = empty
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1944 A"
		}
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_carrier_naval_bomber = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			OR = {
				check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 }
				NOT = { has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny" }
			}
		}
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
		set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C reason=unmapped_country"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_FALLBACK | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C reason=aat_not_active"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 } }
			if = {
				limit = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending }
				if = {
					limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
				}
				else = {
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_RETRY | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C result=created_with_mio mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 2 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C status=assigned mapping=alternate mio=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey]"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_ASSIGNMENT | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C status=assigned mapping=primary mio=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
			}
		}
		clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending } }
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c_mio_pending
			if = {
				limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_alternate = 0 } }
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=unmapped no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
			else = {
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_MIO_PENDING | owner=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C action=defer_and_retry reason=primary_and_alternate_unavailable primary=[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey] alternate=[?DAI_air_design_team_alternate.GetTokenKey] no_mio_variant_created=no"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 } }
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
				}
			}
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_UPGRADE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber new_profile=C prior_profile=weaker_exact_owned"
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
		if = {
			limit = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C source=real_tech"
		}
		else = {
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C source=licensed_frame"
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 C"
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_carrier_naval_bomber = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_selection = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = {
			check_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 0 }
			has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
			NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
		}
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_3
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_4_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = empty
							special_type_slot_2 = empty
							special_type_slot_3 = empty
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_created = 1 }
